title: Physically Based Rendering
creator: Matt Pharr, Wenzel Jakob, and Greg Humphreys
description: The complete online fourth edition explains a working physically based renderer from mathematical foundations through geometry, materials, light transport, sampling, and implementation.
useful: It pairs rigorous explanation with real source code, making it valuable both as a textbook and as an implementation reference.
audience: Advanced graphics programmers and researchers studying physically based rendering or ray tracing.
learning: Follow a renderer from camera rays to final image
